summary: The user sought recommendations for documentaries on climate change and expressed interest in sustainable fashion, particularly the impact of fast fashion on the environment. The conversation covered various aspects of sustainable materials, recycling, upcycling, and certifications to look for when shopping for sustainable fashion.
facts: The user reads The New Yorker magazine on Sundays. The user recently read an article in The New Yorker about the environmental impact of consumerism. The user is interested in learning more about sustainable fabrics, specifically organic cotton. The user is curious about the recycling and upcycling of clothing and their benefits in reducing waste. The user is interested in how fashion brands incorporate sustainability into their designs and supply chains. The user is looking for certifications to consider when shopping for sustainable fashion.
